name: The Unbound Project
description:
Finally... Time to keep the progress with this bot.

Shit... Making a RPG bot is fire, I quite like to experience any new forms of making bots. I need to find a better pfp for this. Also!

Pokémon Unbound hackrom is made by Team Skeli, and it is still in progress, the original Pokémon Red (basis for creating the rom) is created by Game Freak and obviously, Nintendo (just added here them because yes).

This bot is taking me a lot of time... (Like, really! It is almost a project for me) I decided to put locations that exist in-game (just towns and villages, I ain't putting all the routes bruh 😭), and also the main characters!!!!!!! Look at this fricking map:

I plan to put ALL those areas in red and green (both dark and light green), ALONG with the important characters...

Currently stopped at Tarmigan Town, but at process (when I have time, I'll go and finish a little bit more of this bot)

Two humans beings who have done Unbound bots before me:

Pango! (Jax)

And... Tonsil!!!! (Aklove)

Drip Asriel. If you have seen this before:

YOU ARE EXPENDABLE.

Actual shitpost of today: (might be true)
creator: NotSunnday
